summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HopeConnect MVP - a homeless/low-income resource app with pastel brutalism design. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend navigation, search, filtering, and core features functional. MOCKED integrations (Google Maps, Twilio SMS) properly implemented with user notices. Authentication flow working with minor UI overlay issue. Design follows cute pastel brutalism guidelines with proper fonts and styling.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay prevents clicking Sign In button - requires force=True to bypass

passed_tests: All backend API endpoints (19/19 tests passed)
Home page loads with hero section and feature cards
Resources page with search, filtering, and mocked map notice
Jobs page with search and type filtering
Benefits page with search and category filtering
Community page with post viewing capability
Emergency page with 4 crisis hotlines and call buttons
MOCKED Google Maps integration showing proper notice
MOCKED Twilio SMS integration logging correctly
Design compliance: Nunito/Figtree fonts, thick borders, flat shadows, pastel colors
Profile page with user data and favorites
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix auth modal overlay issue preventing Sign In button clicks. Consider adjusting z-index or modal backdrop to allow proper interaction.
